title: Arjuna: Refined Storage [PBR 512x]
description: Realistic resource pack with PBR textures for the Refined Storage and addons.
body:
![Arjuna: Refined Storage [PBR 512x]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d066808ae79221bcbda086af72f53256efe3de2f.jpeg)

Realistic resource pack with PBR textures for the [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) and addons: ExtraStorage, Extra Disks, Refined Types.


For best results, it’s highly recommended to use compatible shaders such as Complementary, IterationRP or Bliss. Make sure to enable “RP Support” in shader settings by selecting the option "labPBR."




## Texture Completion Progress
- Refined Storage - 99%
- Extra Storage - 100%
- Extra Disks - 100%
- Refined Types - 99%
- Refined Storage - Mekanism Integration - 100%
- Cable Tiers - 80% (WIP)

## Features:
- Realistic Surface Textures: Includes roughness and metal effects for enhanced visuals.
- Parallax Occlusion Mapping (POM): Adds depth and detail to surfaces for more realistic appearances.
- Glow Effects: Emissive textures bring additional life and atmosphere to various blocks.


## Texture resolutions:
- Items - 128px
- Blocks - 512px
